reviews.review_description: Everyone calling this the best hand tracking game ever and yet it hardly tracks your hands and constantly loses tracking even in a perfectly lit room. The mechanics are clunky at best.

developer_response.body: Hi there! We are sorry to hear you're having trouble playing Finger Gun. Please feel free to shoot us a message at info@mirustudio.eu. We'll make everything on our hands to help.

reviews.review_description:
You can see it included as in my Top 10 App Lab games video series here: https://youtu.be/0YXaguvpL9Y

This wave shooter is a polished gem that makes great use of hand/finger tracking.

reviews.review_title: Must try if you’re into new tech
reviews.review_description:
This game really pushes the limits of what hand tracking games can be, I think this can get really competitive once people get used to it.

Hand tracking makes the mechanics surprisingly intuitive and easy to get anyone into it (my almost 60 y/o mom had a blast), but I really recommend resting a bit between your first runs to prevent your fingers from getting tired (in my experience, this goes away after playing a few times once your fingers get used to it).

Aside from that, the game is quite polished and the art style looks great, and the game has an upgrade system and multiple weapons to keep things different and interesting. 

As an early adopter (CV1), this is a very interesting progression for the technology and makes me exited for where developers will go as the tech improves.

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, but falls a bit short.
reviews.review_description:
So first off i would love to say, the hand tracking in this game is amazing. the gun fighting, and grapple work very well.
   However; with that said. I would love to address that this game has amazing potential, but with this wave style shooting for this price, please rethink something here. keep the wave shooting, because pretty much everyone has it, but create a rogue like game. grapple between areas in a room, pull upgrades towards to, keep progressing with random encounters. i feel this game runs so well. it deserves more. Please don’t get me wrong, but this game really would benefit from that.

developer_response.body:
Hey ARCHMOWiE,

We are very glad that your experience with hand tracking in Finger Gun was as good as we intented to! Thanks a lot for the feedback and honesty too. Our aim right now is to keep updating Finger Gun and adding new content little by little. Your comment has been heard!

Thanks a lot,

Miru

reviews.review_title: what hand tracking in VR is all about!!
reviews.review_description: This is exactly what you want to see from a game with hand and finger tracking. the art style is beautiful and the story is super fun. The gameplay is really fun and challenging but the star is the handtracking, its a must buy title for all quest owners
really shows the capabilities of hand tracking  very fun! 👈🤠👉

reviews.review_title: Finger Guns Are Back With A VR Bang
reviews.review_description:
Finger Gun is an amazing hand tracking game only available for the Quest.  You will arm yourself by making the shape of a gun with your hands. Your hands will be transformed into lethal guns. 

No controllers needed, full hand tracking game, and one of the better if not the best hand tracking I have used.

The game will have you fighting swarms of robots coming at you in waves. You will have to shot them down, before they get you. You will need some space to play, you will be ducking and stepping side to side to dodge incoming attacks. 

The game felt very immersive and had me ducking and sliding around to evade attacks. The hand tracking feels very natural. My only problem was getting out of the habit of using my index finger to pull the trigger, instead of using my thumb. This is quickly over come the more you play.

The game is just more than a hand tracking wave shooter, you will also be granted upgrades to your weapons and have new guns to try out.

If you are looking for a good hand tracking game or wave shooter, this is must try out VR experience.
 
Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/ieHsAzlPPqU
A lot of fun hand tracking works great only issue is when your moving around hand tracking is sometimes lost. Would recommend

Update:
Just uupdated the game, and wow, it feels even better now. the 180 and 360 options make the game more dificult, and more fun!
Handtracking performance is great as well, and loved all new enemies and weapons (specially the glove).
It feels now more balanced in terms of difficulty, and gained a lot of playability on top of what the game previous offered.
Really much in love with this game, guys! Need to try!

Old review:
All I have to say about this game is that it brings me a lot of hours of fun. It´s one of those games that you can play over and over and keeps you wanting more!. Reached level 10 (1st boss) already, and I´m really eager to play again to kill that m****f**** XD

The mechanics are amazing, it´s awesome to see how the game takes advantage of what you may thought is a crappy tech like Hand Tracking. I played Hand Physics Lab couple of times before buying Finger Gun and though HandTracking was totally useless, but no! Actually, it´s really fun and as far as you have a good light in the room, this title works flawless. Of course playing gets you tired and you sometimes fail with the right gestures, but hey, that´s part of the fun on this game. you need to keep a good posture and kill all the swarms. Old School.

Another aspect I love from this game is that you don´t need 4 hours to play. You can just connect your headset for 30 minutes and have some fun before dinner.

Definitely, a game I´d recommend.

For some reason all of the mechanics are super fun - it just makes me smile how you shoot your finger guns, slot an upgrade into your arm and then shoot some more! It’s all just so satisfying :) 

What i like the most is probably the fact, that you can shoot the guns by hitting your middle finger with your thumb - it just adds a really nice haptic feedback, that is often missing in games with hand tracking - good job devs, really clever!

I hope that there will be more content and hopefully the game will also arive on the official store - it deserves it!
Love the game, love the finger guns and the enemies are awesome

At first I thought this game was gonna be another crappy HT game, a wannabe PistolWhip. Couldn't be more mistaken. This game is brilliantly designed for HT and I feel comfortable saying it is the best HT game out there.
A fair price for what this game has to offer. It's great!!!

reviews.review_title: The best hand tracking game so far
reviews.review_description: I was REALLY skeptical about how good the hand tracking would be in this game and I was blown away by it. I don't understand what the devs have done to achieve this, but the result is UNBELIEVABLE!

It’s ALMOST there. I will say, I’ve never been a fan of using hand gestures because it never works flawlessly. Controllers are far more precise compared to the current hand tech. I’ve tried the air guitar game and that was beyond unplayable. However, this game does what little it does pretty well. It feels like 90% of my gestures are captured right now… if you could raise it to 100%, then I’d say you made VR history.  
 
Long story short, as long as the developers continue updating and perfecting this game, then it’s a no brainer purchase. Finger gun is far and away the best hand tracking I’ve experienced. I give this a solid 8/10, with room to be 10/10 in the future.

reviews.review_title: Good game but  touch  controllers do not
reviews.review_description: Work

developer_response.body:
Hey Breadvr2 !
Thank you so much for the rating, we are super happy that you are enjoying the game. 

We built Finger Gun on top of hand tracking technology so that it could be a unique shooting experience. This is the reason we haven't add support for controllers. We might consider doing so in the future, though!
